reasoning: 8x zoom reveals multiple AI tells. (1) AA/soft edges: the border pixels feather into semi-transparent states rather than crisp 1px hard stops expected in pixel-art assets. (2) Noise in solid areas: the salmon-pink fill is not flat; scattered darker and lighter pixels appear throughout what should be a uniform tone. (3) Inconsistent outline: the bounding rectangle outline varies between ~1px and ~2px width at different corners, suggesting hallucinated rather than intentional stroke. (4) Gradient shading: a faint horizontal highlight band runs through the center-upper portion of the bar—three distinct tones where a hand-authored 2-tone asset would use hard dithering. (5) Pattern artifacts: diagonal stripe-like compression smearing is visible at 8x in the fill region, typical of diffusion model texture hallucination. No semantic failure (shape reads correctly as a health bar fill), but the geometric and tonal defects are too numerous and clear to pass.
